common.notMedicalAdvice: This platform provides information and peer support only — it is not a substitute for professional medical advice. Always consult your healthcare team.
common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common.errorContact: If this continues, contact your care team directly.

home.heroTitle: Support for whānau of preterm twins
home.heroSubtitle: Private. Culturally safe. Built for Aotearoa.
home.heroDescription: A sovereign, privacy-first platform connecting whānau of preterm twins with services, information, and each other — across Aotearoa New Zealand.

roleSelector.title: Nau mai, haere mai — Welcome
roleSelector.subtitle: Supporting whānau of preterm twins across Aotearoa New Zealand
roleSelector.parentDescription: Get support, information, and guidance for your journey
roleSelector.practitionerDescription: Access tools, resources, and directory management

features.title: Built for whānau, by whānau
features.subtitle: Every feature designed with cultural safety and privacy at its heart.
features.privacyDescription: Your data never leaves Aotearoa. End-to-end encrypted and under your control.
features.directoryDescription: Find services, support groups, and specialists across all regions of Aotearoa.
features.culturalDescription: Designed with and for Māori whānau. Te Tiriti o Waitangi-aligned practices throughout.
features.supportDescription: Connect with other whānau who understand the journey of premature twins.
features.guidesDescription: Curated information in plain language, reviewed by clinicians and whānau.
features.aiDescription: A gentle AI guide to help navigate information — always transparent, never a replacement for your care team.

values.title: What we stand for
values.subtitle: Our kaupapa guides every decision we make.
values.manaDescription: Upholding the sovereignty and self-determination of whānau in every interaction.
values.whanauDescription: The whole whānau is supported — not just the patient. Siblings, partners, grandparents included.
values.tikaDescription: Honest, accurate, and culturally appropriate information — always.
values.manaakiDescription: Genuine care and hospitality in every feature, every word, every interaction.

directory.title: National Directory
directory.subtitle: Services and support across Aotearoa
directory.searchPlaceholder: Search services, organisations, or support types...
directory.noResults: No services found matching your search.
directory.noResultsSuggestion: Try broadening your search or selecting a different region.

parent.subtitle: Your private space for support, information, and connection.

practitioner.subtitle: Tools and resources for healthcare professionals and support organisations.

consent.title: Your privacy choices
consent.subtitle: You are in control of your information. Review and change your preferences at any time.
consent.analyticsDescription: Help us improve the platform by sharing anonymous usage data. No personal information is collected.
consent.supportDescription: Allow us to suggest connections with other whānau in similar circumstances.
consent.disclaimer: You can withdraw consent at any time. Withdrawing consent will not affect services already received.

errors.pageDescription: We've logged the issue and will look into it.
errors.notFoundDescription: This page may have moved or been removed. If you need help, contact your care team directly.
errors.serverDescription: We're experiencing a temporary issue. Please try again shortly.

footer.notMedicalAdvice: This platform is not a substitute for professional medical advice.
footer.acknowledgement: We acknowledge the tangata whenua of Aotearoa and are committed to the principles of Te Tiriti o Waitangi.
footer.copyright: Front Line Whānau. Built with aroha in Aotearoa.
